---
title: "Data Acquisition"
description: "Downloading and validating SMRI, GEO, and reference datasets alongside a fully reproducible Docker + Snakemake computational environment."
image: "/images/Phase 1.png"
---

## Overview

Foundational phase combining data acquisition, probe coverage validation, and reproducible environment setup. Confirms the raw datasets contain the variants, samples, and coverage needed — and that the full pipeline is reproducible from a single `docker build` command.

## Methods

*Coming soon.*

## Deliverables

*Coming soon.*

## Results

*Coming soon.*
